## src/lib/manifest

**Purpose:** Track ECC-installed artifacts in `.ecc-manifest.json`. Determines which files are ECC-managed vs user-custom.

## src/lib/merge

**Purpose:** Directory merging during `ecc install` with interactive diff review. Supports per-file accept/keep/smart-merge decisions with category-scoped apply-all.

**Key exports:** `mergeDirectory()`, `mergeSkills()`, `mergeRules()`, `mergeHooks()`, `promptFileReview()`, `combineMergeReports()`, `printMergeReport()`

**Dependencies:** None (uses smart-merge internally via dynamic import path)

**Dependents:** install-orchestrator

**Doc coverage:** 100% (16/16) — [Details](API-SURFACE.md#merge) | [Quality](DOC-QUALITY.md)

## src/lib/smart-merge

**Purpose:** LCS-based line diff algorithm with colored side-by-side display. Includes Claude CLI integration for AI-assisted merging and byte-level file comparison.
